jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Cyient
jsonLd.description:
Cyient, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
